title: Fleroya
intro: Fleroya is a flowering plant species, native to tropical regions, characterized by its fragrant flowers and woody stem. Fleroya has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Fleroya include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. Fleroya is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in the form of tinctures and essential oils, which are used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.

Fleroya species are typically characterized by their showy flowers and often fragrant foliage.
